ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instance_types_historic" (
  "instance_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instance type */,
  "instance_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the instance type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instance type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the instance type */,
  "vcpu" INTEGER /* Number of virtual CPUs */,
  "memory_gb" INTEGER /* Memory in GB */,
  "storage_gb" INTEGER /* Storage in GB */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the instance type was effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the instance type expired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_type_id", "effective_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned to the role */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was removed from the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id", "effective_date")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each instance type
Date when the instance type was effective
Date when the instance type expired
Date when the report was generated
Date when the user was assigned to the role
Date when the user was removed from the role
